hero.title: The art of perfect brows
hero.subtitle: Discover the natural beauty of your brows through precise, professional and personalized grooming. Harmony, expressiveness and elegance – all in the right hands.

about.title: About our services
about.text: We use modern techniques and high-quality products to enhance the natural shape of your brows. Each session is personalized according to your features and preferences.

packages.title: Choose the right package for you
packages.subtitle: All packages include essential services for a complete experience

services.title: Professional brow care
services.subtitle: Choose from our specialized services for a natural, clean and elegant look. Each service is tailored to your needs.

stilizare_forma.name: Shaping & waxing
stilizare_forma.description: Careful definition of brow shape, adapted to your features, with complete waxing of the area for a clean and polished look.

intretinere.name: Maintenance & waxing
intretinere.description: Maintaining the created shape, correcting grown hairs and delicate waxing to keep the result fresh, symmetrical and even.

vopsire_gel.name: Shaping & tint gel
vopsire_gel.description: Complete brow shaping followed by professional gel/tint coloring for enhanced color and a defined natural brow line.

laminare_stilizare.name: Lamination & Botox
laminare_stilizare.description: Complete lamination, shaping and botox treatment for the hair that tames unruly strands and adds natural volume, with a sleek, well-defined brow effect.

laminare_tonare.name: Lamination & Toner & Botox
laminare_tonare.description: Lamination for structure, toner for color harmony and botox for deep hair hydration, all in one complete care package.

gallery.title: Our work
gallery.subtitle: Discover the results we offer in the salon
gallery.empty: Add images to the {path} folder and update the list in this component.

contact.title: Contact & Bookings
contact.subtitle: Contact us for bookings or questions and see the salon location below

footer.follow: Follow us for inspiration and new results.
footer.description: Studio specialized in brow styling and care, with emphasis on natural look, balance and fine details
